results.owner_or_reason: Process/tooling ADR for the delivery orchestrator's own meta-harness (tools/act3/delivery-engine.js v9) that runs this delivery program — not an Orvex Studio product deliverable. Gap-hunt verdict is 'Zero gaps': all normative mechanics (claimedIds guard, partition disjointness, startup reclaim, P1 anti-auto-close, In-Progress claim flip) are 'existing, kept' and already landed; carries no FR-*/NFR-*/A-*/AD-*/D-* ids for the story breakdown to cover. The one named future component (Temporal ClaimWorkflow CAS in orvex-workflows) is explicitly DEFERRED, build-only-on-trip-wire. Not in coverage-index.json; no feature-map.txt or breakdown/*/plan.json story references it or its concept (workgraph E3-S1/E6-S4 'claim CAS' hits are the unrelated FR-MEM4/NFR-MEM6 working-memory claim mechanism, not this ADR's delivery-engine.js harness).
